_readme: Live data source for the Network Status page (/status). Edit this file to change what visitors see - the page fetches it and refreshes every ~60s, so NO site rebuild is required. Each service 'status' must be one of: operational | maintenance | degraded | outage. Set 'updated' to the current time in ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-07-02T14:30:00-04:00). The top banner follows the most severe service automatically; optionally add a top-level 'overall' (same values) to force it. To post an incident, add an object to 'incidents' with: title, status, body, time (ISO).
